#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table transform_inspector_address into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import json
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
#import pandas as pd
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import os
import re
from itertools import chain
from collections.abc import Mapping
from operator import add
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format,when, to_date,current_date,concat,cast,regexp_replace,coalesce
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.sap_hr_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.load_sap_hr_weekly"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}saphr/load_sap_hr_weekly"

print(target_delta_table)
print(delta_table_path)

# Step 1: Read source Delta Table
df_source_sap_weekly = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferSchema", "false").table(source_delta_table)

# Remove records where 'PersNo' is NULL
df_source_sap_weekly = df_source_sap_weekly.filter(col("PersNo").isNotNull())

# Exclude "ingested_datetime", "expected_from", "expected_to" from rowid_columns
excluded_columns = {"ingested_datetime", "expected_from", "expected_to"} 

rowid_columns = [c for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns if c not in excluded_columns]

# Select required columns and ensure correct data types present in the target dataframe
target_sap_hr_weekly_df = df_source_sap_weekly.select(
    *[col(c).cast("string") for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns if c not in ["FTE2", "FTE", "Wkhrs", "CivilServiceStart","DatetoCurrentJob","SeniorityDate", "DatetoSubstGrade", "OrgStartDate","Birthdate","ingested_datetime", "expected_from", "expected_to"]], # Convert other columns to STRING
    col("FTE2").cast("double").alias("FTE2"),
    col("FTE").cast("double").alias("FTE"),
    col("Wkhrs").cast("double").alias("Wkhrs"),
    to_date(col("CivilServiceStart"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("CivilServiceStart"),
    to_date(col("DatetoCurrentJob"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("DatetoCurrentJob"),
    to_date(col("SeniorityDate"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("SeniorityDate"),    
    to_date(col("DatetoSubstGrade"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("DatetoSubstGrade"),
    to_date(col("OrgStartDate"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("OrgStartDate"),
    to_date(col("Birthdate"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("Birthdate"),
    # Add additional metadata fields
    current_date().cast("date").alias("Report_MonthEnd_Date"),
    current_date().alias("PDAC_ETL_Date"),
    lit("SapHr").alias("SourceSystemID"),
    current_timestamp().alias("IngestionDate"),
    current_date().cast("timestamp").alias("ValidTo"),
    md5(concat(*[coalesce(col(c).cast("string"), lit("")) for c in rowid_columns])).alias("RowID"),
    lit("Y").alias("IsActive")
)

#target_sap_hr_weekly_df.printSchema()

# Write data to target Delta Table
try:
    target_sap_hr_weekly_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)

    # Ensure the table exists
    spark.sql(f"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {target_delta_table} USING DELTA LOCATION '{delta_table_path}'")

    print(f" Data successfully written to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# 1. Read staging table
df_stg = spark.read.table("sap_hr.stg_inspector_address")

# 2. Replace empty Charting Officer for Inspector with null
df_stg = df_stg.withColumn(
    "Charting Officer for Inspector",
    when(col("Charting Officer for Inspector") == "", None)
    .otherwise(col("Charting Officer for Inspector"))
)

# 3. Select latest Start Date per Staff Number
window_spec = Window.partitionBy("Staff Number").orderBy(col("Start Date").desc())
df_latest = df_stg.withColumn("row_num", row_number().over(window_spec)) \
            .filter(col("row_num") == 1) \
                .drop("row_num")

# 4. Transform Charting Officer column
df_latest = df_latest.withColumn(
    "Charting Officer",
    when(length(col("Charting Officer")) == 6,
        when(col("Charting Officer").startswith("50"), concat(lit("00"), col("Charting Officer")))
        .when(col("Charting Officer").startswith("42"), concat(lit("50"), col("Charting Officer")))
        .otherwise(col("Charting Officer"))
    ).when(length(col("Charting Officer")) == 8, col("Charting Officer"))
    .otherwise(col("Charting Officer"))
)

# 5. Aggregate (group by) & add Personal Mobile as null
grouped_df = df_latest.groupBy(
    "Staff Number", "Street and House Number", "2nd Address Line", "City", "District", "Postal Code",
    "Region (State, Province, Count)", "Start Date", "End Date", "Charting Officer",
    "Charting Officer for Inspector", "Subs PS group", "Tel No.", "Work Mobile"
).agg(
    max("Chngd on").alias("Chngd on")
).withColumn("Personal Mobile", lit(None).cast("string")) \
 .withColumnRenamed("Region (State, Province, Count)", "Region") \
 .withColumnRenamed("Tel No.", "Telephone no")

# 6. Overwrite transform table
grouped_df.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("sap_hr.transform_inspector_address")

# 7. Read back & compute hash key (ValHashKey)
df_transform = spark.read.table("sap_hr.transform_inspector_address")

df_with_hash = df_transform.withColumn(
    "ValHashKey", md5(concat_ws("|",
    "Staff Number", "Street and House Number", "2nd Address Line", "City", "District",
    "Postal Code", "Region", "Start Date", "End Date", "Charting Officer",
    "Charting Officer for Inspector", "Subs PS group", "Telephone no",
    "Personal Mobile", "Work Mobile", "Chngd on"
    ))
)

# 8. Deduplicate using row_number
dedup_spec = Window.partitionBy("Staff Number").orderBy(col("Chngd on").desc())
df_final = df_with_hash.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(dedup_spec)).filter("rn = 1").drop("rn")

# 9. Overwrite final table with deduplicated records
df_final.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("sap_hr.transform_inspector_address")
